{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Valinhall forge
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] has conquered the [[Valinhall forge]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c3">''City of Light'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
